scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:lambda && pnpm run build
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use deploy:dev or deploy:prod (NODE_ENV is required).' && exit 1
scripts.deploy:dev: pnpm run build:all && NODE_ENV=development cdk deploy BaramStack
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm run build:all && NODE_ENV=production cdk deploy BaramStackProd --profile nasun-prod
